things.name: Shwedagon Pagoda
things.description: Possibly the world's most beautiful Buddhist stupa at 98m gold-covered and encrusted with diamonds

things.name: Bogyoke Aung San Market (Scott Market)
things.description: 1926 colonial market with jade, lacquerware, traditional fabrics and Burmese gems

things.name: Sule Pagoda
things.description: 2,000-year-old octagonal pagoda at the centre of the British colonial grid plan

things.name: Colonial Architecture Walk
things.description: British colonial buildings from the 1890s-1920s along Pansodan and Strand streets

things.name: Chaukhtatgyi Buddha Temple
things.description: Reclining Buddha 66m long with beautifully painted eyes and an elaborate fishtail

things.name: National Museum of Myanmar
things.description: Regalia of the last Burmese kings including the Lion Throne and royal ceremonial attire

things.name: Strand Hotel
things.description: 1901 colonial landmark hotel on the riverfront - have tea or a Pegu Club cocktail

things.name: Yangon Circular Train
things.description: 3-hour loop on the 1950s commuter train through Yangon's suburbs and countryside

things.name: Inya Lake
things.description: Boat trip on the lake with the hillside Kaba Aye Pagoda and World Peace Pagoda

things.name: Bago Day Trip
things.description: Ancient Mon capital 80km away with the world's largest reclining Buddha
